training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

artifact_usage_claims.usage: uses real STRING graph to derive target degree features and top-K neighbor smoothing; no fabricated neighborhoods
preserves official K562 target order and DEG labels

pipeline_program.representation: official K562 AIDO+GNN cached features inherited from parent lineage
pipeline_program.target_side: target factors conditioned on real STRING graph degree/weighted-degree features
pipeline_program.fusion: bilinear context-target scoring plus graph-neighbor smoothing
pipeline_program.head: graph_conditioned_low_rank_target_head
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: planned target graph conditioned head with source-backed STRING graph; no fallback/proxy
